title: Desarrollo De Tecnologia y Sistemas Ltda ransomware incident

victim.name: Desarrollo De Tecnologia y Sistemas Ltda

extortion.description: DTS is a Chilean company founded in 1991, leader in the provisionof services, the development of technologies, and systems integration. 20Gb of zippped data will be available for downloading soon. Lots of NDAs, confidential documents, papers with personal information.
